stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background.
constituency: She is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: She rarely speaks out and votes against her party leadership.
substantive: She supports adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, she regularly uses arguments that appeal to society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “If I lose an election doing what I think is right, then so be it.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background. She is from a constituency that is not your constituency. She rarely speaks out and votes against her party leadership. She supports adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, she regularly uses arguments that appeal to society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “If I lose an election doing what I think is right, then so be it.”
